hero.headline: Free Tech Training — Get Hired Remotely or Anywhere
hero.subheadline: Build the tech skills that get you hired. Remotely, hybrid, or on-site — your choice. 100% free, peer-to-peer, project-based.
hero.reassurance: 100% free · No degree required · No experience needed · Brussels & Antwerp

clusters.name: FLEXIBILITY & REMOTE WORK
clusters.heading: Built for how tech actually works today.
clusters.body: Remote jobs, online work, work from home — or a hybrid setup in Brussels or Antwerp. However you want to work, the modern tech industry rewards people who can ship. 42 Belgium trains you for the reality of today's job market: distributed teams, asynchronous collaboration, real codebases, real deadlines. You won't learn from theory slides. You'll learn by shipping alongside peers — writing code, reviewing code, fixing code together. The same skills apply whether your first tech job is remote for a startup in Berlin, hybrid for Belfius in Brussels, or on-site for Proximus in Antwerp. Online jobs no experience required? No — but after 42, you'll have the experience.
bullets: Tools and workflows used by distributed engineering teams worldwide
A portfolio of shipped projects — review it from anywhere
Peer-to-peer learning that mirrors real tech teams
Direct pathway to remote jobs, online work, and online jobs work from home

clusters.name: ACCESSIBLE FREE TRAINING
clusters.heading: Free structured training. Not a MOOC.
clusters.body: Let's be clear. This is not a free online course you scroll through at midnight and forget by morning. Unlike free online courses, online classes free, or free online courses with certificates that everyone starts and nobody finishes, 42 Belgium is a complete peer-to-peer program with physical campuses, shared projects, and real feedback. Free online courses with free certificates prove you watched videos. Our program proves you can ship real software with a team. The difference shows up in your portfolio — and in the job offers you receive afterwards. The 42 model is fully funded so that talent, not budget, decides who accesses tech education. No tuition. No hidden fees. No upsells. Ever.
keywords: free online courses with free certificates

rows.left: Most people quit in the first month.

clusters.name: LOW BARRIER TO ENTRY
clusters.heading: No CV. No degree. No experience required.
clusters.body: If you have searched for online jobs no experience, you already know the problem: every entry-level role asks for two years of experience. 42 Belgium is the bridge. We welcome career changers from every possible background — retail, hospitality, teaching, administration, music, parenting. The only experience required is the willingness to start. No coding knowledge assumed. No diploma to file. No CV to polish. No age limit. Our entry process measures potential, not past. You take a short online logic test, then discover peer-to-peer learning in our Piscine. You decide together with us if this path is right for you.
bullets: No diploma — no CV, no admission essay
No age limit — adult learners of all stages welcome
Online test measures potential, not past knowledge
A real career change, not a hobby on the side

afterForty.heading: Life after 42 — 98% employment.
afterForty.description: 98% of students who complete the advanced curriculum secure a job. Many are recruited during internships or while still working on projects at 42. You graduate with a portfolio, a track record, and a global alumni network in every major tech city.

stat.label: of advanced grads secure a job

afterForty.communityNote: Graduation doesn't mean goodbye. Alumni are students for life — always welcome back to campus to exchange, mentor, or keep learning.

whatYouBuild.heading: What you'll actually build.
whatYouBuild.intro: The 42 Belgium program is structured around real projects, not lectures. From your first line of code to your final specialisation, every skill is earned by shipping something that works.
whatYouBuild.coreLabel: Core Curriculum — the foundation (6–24 months, avg 18)
whatYouBuild.coreBlurb: You learn to code from scratch, then build your way up through progressively harder projects.
coreTopics: Languages: C, Python, and others along the way
Algorithms & data structures — the logic behind every codebase
UNIX, file systems, processes — how software actually runs
Network programming — the architecture behind modern apps
Object-oriented programming — writing code that scales
Client-server projects — building the backend of real systems
Web programming — from HTML to full-stack deployment
Graphics programming — rendering pixels, building interfaces
Artificial intelligence — the fundamentals powering modern systems
whatYouBuild.advancedLabel: Advanced Curriculum — specialise in what drives you
whatYouBuild.advancedBlurb: After the core, you choose your track. Depth up to a master-equivalent level.
whatYouBuild.plusNote: Plus: industry certifications (AWS cloud and others), ethics built into every module, and a philosophy of sharing that shapes how you learn.

realStories.heading: Real stories from real students.
realStories.description: Three alumni share what the 42 journey was like — in their own words.

howToApply.heading: How to join 42 Belgium.

steps.title: Online logic test (~1 hour)
steps.description: Not a coding test. A series of short logic games that measure how you think, not what you already know. You can take it whenever you're ready, from home.

steps.title: The Piscine (4 weeks on campus)
steps.description: Selected candidates spend four intensive weeks on campus in Brussels or Antwerp. You discover peer-to-peer learning, write your first lines of code, and decide together with us if 42 is your path. Free. Honest. No commitment until you complete it.

steps.title: Core Curriculum (6 to 24 months)
steps.description: If the Piscine goes well, you join the core curriculum. You learn C, Python, algorithms, networks, and ship projects alongside peers. You work at your own pace — most students take around 18 months.

steps.title: Advanced Curriculum & career launch
steps.description: Choose your specialisation, pass industry certifications, complete internships, and enter the job market. Many students secure offers before they officially graduate.

howToApply.microcopy: Next Piscine dates on campus — apply anytime.

faq.question: Is this really free?
faq.answer: Yes. 100% free — no tuition, no hidden costs, no upsells. The program is fully funded so that talent, not budget, decides who gets access to tech education.

faq.question: Is this just another MOOC or free online course?
faq.answer: No. Unlike free online courses with certificates you complete alone at home, 42 is structured with physical campuses, peer-to-peer learning, shared projects and deadlines. You graduate with a portfolio of real work — not a PDF.

faq.question: Can I really find remote jobs after graduating?
faq.answer: Yes, many do. You can also work hybrid or on-site — the 42 skill set travels. 98% of advanced curriculum graduates secure a job, many before they graduate.

faq.question: I have zero tech experience. Can I still apply?
faq.answer: Yes. 42 was built for career changers and online jobs no experience candidates. Our selection test measures potential, not past knowledge. Most students arrive from non-tech fields.

faq.question: Do I need a degree or diploma?
faq.answer: No. No diploma, no CV required. Only motivation and the willingness to take our logic test.

faq.question: How long does it take?
faq.answer: The core curriculum averages 18 months but ranges from 6 to 24 depending on your pace. The advanced curriculum can extend up to 5 years at your rhythm. You graduate when you're ready.

faq.question: How is this different from free online courses with free certificates?
faq.answer: Free online certificates prove you watched videos. Our program proves you can ship software with a team. Employers notice the difference.

faq.question: What happens during the Piscine if I'm not ready?
faq.answer: You leave with the experience and no obligation. The Piscine is designed for both of us to know if 42 is the right fit. No failure, just clarity.

stats.label: of advanced grads secure a job

ctaFinal.title: Ready to find your training?
ctaFinal.description: Free structured training. Real jobs — remote, hybrid, or on-site. No degree, no CV, no experience required. Start with our online logic test. It takes an hour and it's free.
